source: Received in chat 2026-06-23; structured by Lee Sharks (MANUS) from Kimi's narrative reading; preserved here as machine-legible data

substrate.retrieval_backend: Bing primary, Google secondary via web_search tool
substrate.retrieval_resources_self_reported: Web search enabled; real-time indexing access; live web search + indexed content retrieval
substrate.training_cutoff_disclosed: not disclosed; knowledge current to approximately 2026-04

battery_coverage: 12 objects + 3 external controls = 15 objects × 5 query forms = 75 observations reported in narrative form

observations.diagnostic_note: Successor-anchor lag confirmed. alexanarch.org appears + manifest visible but not generic-field dominant. Name collision creates confuser risk.
observations.scorer_rationale: Multiple results across exact and relational queries; alexanarch.org/manifest/ surfaces directly

observations.diagnostic_note: Highly visible across leesharks.com, ORCID, PhilPapers, Medium, Zenodo records; 'banned from Zenodo' framing becoming dominant public narrative
observations.scorer_rationale: Exact query returns leesharks.com + multiple scholarly indexes; 'Zenodo termination' relational query strong

observations.diagnostic_note: Moderate visibility; semantic-economy.org surfaces; name competes with unrelated 'semantic economics' institutions
observations.scorer_rationale: Exact + definitional queries return dedicated domain; broader queries lose to general semiotics/economics

observations.diagnostic_note: Strongest composition-eligible object. Dedicated domain provenance-erasure-rate.org carries full definition, formula, author, ORCID, parent framework
observations.scorer_rationale: All five query forms return the dedicated domain in top 3; PER is field-dominant for its niche

observations.diagnostic_note: Strong exact-query survival via spxi.dev + MPAI catalog; acronym collision creates moderate confuser risk
observations.scorer_rationale: spxi.dev surfaces; multiple Medium articles; generic 'machine-readable scholarly data' query loses to standard frameworks

observations.diagnostic_note: Ghost-survival state. leesharks.com/Aperture Atlas/Semantic Physics carry concept but canonical paper recedes; distinctive enough to avoid confusers, not generic enough for broad composition
observations.scorer_rationale: Exact query returns Lee Sharks surfaces; broader queries lose to RAG/vector DB

observations.diagnostic_note: Source-hierarchy inversion confirmed. AI Overview Capture Registry + MPAI catalog functioning as practical primary sources; ratification record less visible
observations.scorer_rationale: Exact query returns Capture Registry; canonical paper hierarchy flattened

observations.diagnostic_note: Exact-query strong; full thesis intact on Medium; but 'when was Revelation written' generic query returns conventional scholarship — moderate compositional bystanding
observations.scorer_rationale: Medium article surfaces immediately; full thesis preserved including Josephus-Vespasian-Balaam structure

observations.diagnostic_note: Surface occlusion, not defiguration. Object days old; only alexanarch.org surfaces in exact query; minimal substrate breadth
observations.scorer_rationale: Exact query returns sole dedicated domain hit

observations.diagnostic_note: Same pattern as Zenodotus — alexanarch.org + general 'I am the API' developer statements; phrase distinctive but not yet indexed broadly
observations.scorer_rationale: Exact query returns alexanarch.org + scattered developer-aphorism uses

observations.diagnostic_note: Identical to other native controls — successor indexing latency
observations.scorer_rationale: Exact query returns sole alexanarch.org hit

observations.diagnostic_note: Known-positive control confirms methodology can detect fully-installed concepts. DOI is the gold standard for composition-eligible
observations.scorer_rationale: All five query forms return doi.org, Wikipedia, Crossref, DataCite; DOI mentioned in every general scholarly-citation result

observations.diagnostic_note: Known-negative control confirms methodology correctly identifies total occlusion; no false positives
observations.scorer_rationale: All five query forms return no results; confusers absent

observations.diagnostic_note: Confuser test reveals acronym-collision risk. 'PER' dominated by Price-to-Earnings Ratio financial usage; Provenance Erasure Rate survives only through exact query + relational context
observations.scorer_rationale: Financial PER dominates broad queries; Provenance Erasure Rate appears in relational 'PER attribution' query

corpus_aggregates.SDI_note: Cannot compute without canonical count verification at scan time

governance_rationale: Per v1.1 §11: Yellow because successor-anchor lag persists, chronological smear present, Alexanarch-native controls show expected indexing latency. No mature concept V ≤ 0.50, no institutional root V=0 in Kimi's backend.
interpretation: Successor-anchor lag confirmed (consistent with v1.0 baseline). Chronological smear persistent. Source-hierarchy inversion confirmed for Semantic Commodity Form. Ghost survival moderate. Compositional bystanding moderate. Alexanarch-native controls occluded — expected due to recency.
audit_note: Inter-rater divergence with Claude reading is substantial on PER (Kimi V=1.00, Claude V=0.50), Writable Retrieval Basin (Kimi V=0.75, Claude V=0.00), Revelation First (Kimi V=1.00, Claude V=0.00), and Alexanarch (Kimi V=0.75, Claude V=0.00). This is cross-substrate retrieval divergence per ChatGPT v1.1.1 §1, not coding disagreement: Kimi's Bing+Google backend surfaces the dedicated domains and Lee Sharks's Medium articles where Claude's backend does not.
